title: Viking (VKTX) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
text: Q1 2022 earnings preview for VKTX. Viking Therapeutics was scheduled to announce Q1 earnings results on Tuesday, April 26th, after market close. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.19. Over the three months prior, EPS estimates had seen 1 upward revision and 2 downward revisions. As a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company without approved products on the market, Viking Therapeutics was expected to report a net loss during this period, with the focus likely on pipeline updates rather than revenue figures. The company continued advancement of VK2809 in Phase 2b and was initiating early work on VK2735.
